title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at StayVista South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at StayVista South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the StayVista South Asia Partners family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About StayVista South Asia Partners:
StayVista South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StayVista South Asia Partners!
